case_title: ERIC HALL VS. SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-03-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAT-03-17 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ERIC HALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY RUSSELL LAYLETTA, TRUST AND SAFETY SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAIVES NOTICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF ERIC HALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY RUSSELL LAYLETTA, TRUST AND SAFETY SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAIVED NOTICE ON MAR-22-17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-21-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-22-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCREASE THE AMOUNT OF HIS CLAIM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC. $2,500.62 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.62, DEFENDANT'S PLACEMENT OF SCOOTERS IN AN OPEN PADDOCK WAS UNREASONABLE AS IT WAS FORESEEABLE THAT A SCOOTER WOULD HIT A CAR PARKED IN STALL NO. 17 AND DAMAGE THAT CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.62 FILED BY HALL, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER DENYING REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY HALL, ERIC SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOOT NETWORKS, INC.
